title: LLEN
description: Returns the length of a list.

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

codeExamples.description: Foundational: Get the length of a list using LLEN (returns 0 if key doesn&#39;t exist, useful for checking list size)

intro:
Returns the length of the list stored at `key`.
If `key` does not exist, it is interpreted as an empty list and `0` is returned.
An error is returned when the value stored at `key` is not a list.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
Returns the length of the list stored at `key`.
If `key` does not exist, it is interpreted as an empty list and `0` is returned.
An error is returned when the value stored at `key` is not a list.

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
